task_description: Make metrics row cards clickable to filter the build diff list at /builds/[buildId]

patterns.client_component: Use 'use client' directive, define TypeScript interface for props, use React hooks for state
patterns.metrics_structure: Metrics defined as array with label, value, icon, color, bgColor properties
patterns.styling: Tailwind CSS classes for styling, cursor-pointer for clickable, ring for active state

existing_implementations.description: Filter logic partially exists in page.tsx (pendingDiffs, failedDiffs, changedDiffs). MetricsRow is already a client component.
